info.title: AdminSys SaaS API
info.description: Standard SaaS Onboarding API for external integrations.

ApiKeyAuth.name: x-app-key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Unique identifier for the SaaS application (tenant).

Timestamp.name: x-timestamp
Timestamp.description: Current Unix timestamp in seconds. Used for signature verification.

Nonce.name: x-nonce
Nonce.description: A random string unique to this request to prevent replay attacks.

Signature.name: x-signature
Signature.description: HMAC-SHA256 hash of (Method + Path + Timestamp + Nonce + Body). Signed with App Secret.

get.summary: 获取当前登录用户信息 (含积分与会员等级)
get.description: 返回用户在当前应用上下文中的详细信息，包括可用积分 (`points`) 和会员等级 (`vip_level`)。

post.summary: 创建新订单 (积分充值或订阅)
post.description:
为当前登录用户创建订单。支持购买积分、订阅计划或普通商品。
AI 提示：
1. `items` 数组中的 `productId` 必须从 `/api/v1/products` 获取。
2. 积分充值产品 (`type: 'credits'`) 支付成功后会自动增加用户余额。
3. 订阅产品 (`type: 'subscription'`) 支付成功后会自动更新用户的 VIP 等级。

get.summary: 获取当前应用上架的产品列表 (多租户隔离)
get.description:
返回当前 SaaS 应用在后台配置并上架的所有产品。
AI 提示：在创建订单前，应先调用此接口获取 productId 和最新的价格。

get.summary: Get user profile in the current app context (balance, subscription)
Get user balance and subscription status

post.summary: Save or update an integration configuration
Generate a public share link for a completed debate

get.summary: Get public debate details by share token
